title: Allow first column in board view to be populated by non-text field question in linked form
excerpt: I use forms linked to Monday boards to capture data from clients and would really like to have the option to have the first column populated by a drop down menu from a multi-select question in the form (default is a text…

posts.author: Rollo (Rollo Pinsent)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use forms linked to Monday boards to capture data from clients and would really like to have the option to have the first column populated by a drop down menu from a multi-select question in the form (default is a text only field labelled ‘item’).

This would help with sorting form data received. The first column in the board could be much more effective if it had the option to be populated by other form questions options other than the simple text field.
